title: schizachyrium fragile
intro: Schizachyrium fragile, also known as little bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schizachyrium fragile include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from coughs and colds. Schizachyrium fragile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of medicinal use.
